'''Feldron''' was [[Bria Tharen]]'s agent in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], who accompanied her on her trip onboard the ''[[Queen of Empire]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
